mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_memory (memory_id, workspace_key, workspace_path, type, title, summary, body, status, pinned, importance, source_type, source_run_id, content_hash, version, usage_count, last_used_at) VALUES (#{memoryId}, #{workspaceKey}, #{workspacePath}, #{type}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{body}, #{status}, #{pinned}, #{importance}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRunId}, #{contentHash}, #{version}, #{usageCount}, #{lastUsedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_memory SET type = #{type}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, body = #{body}, status = #{status}, pinned = #{pinned}, importance = #{importance}, source_type = #{sourceType}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, version = #{version}, usage_count = #{usageCount}, last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt}, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId} AND version = #{version} - 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_memory WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId} LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM agent_memory WHERE workspace_key = #{workspaceKey} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (title LIKE '%' || #{searchTerm} || '%' OR summary LIKE '%' || #{searchTerm} || '%' OR body LIKE '%' || #{searchTerm} || '%') ORDER BY pinned DESC, last_used_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
